fields.cpu_parity: 5/5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget (prompt tokens, generated tokens, text) vs the pinned plain-f32 GEMV comparator; also verified token-identical under the repacked and f16/FA oracle variants' captures during comparator bisection
fields.gpu_parity: 5/5 basic_v1 prompts full-budget on the Metal GPU-resident runtime
fields.distributed_parity: TCP layer-sharding (split 13/35) token-identical to the oracle; shared-KV-split and wire-version guards fail closed
fields.api_smoke: non-streaming + SSE chat via CAMELID_GEMMA4_SERVE; typed multimodal rejection; corrected <|turn> markers; no marker/channel leakage
fields.comparator: llama.cpp 5d56eff --no-repack -fa off -ctk f32 -ctv f32 -ub 1 (plain-f32 GEMV path)

claim_boundary: Exact-row text-token generation within the checked basic_v1 prompt pack and API smoke envelope only. No bounded-context promotion, no performance claim beyond the raw logs, no multimodal input (fails closed with a typed error), no neighboring-row or Gemma-family support, no shared-memory claim (distributed mode is layer sharding).
